graph order
78
adjacency matrix

label vector
17 34 41 3 75 64 47 74 31 40 5 77 1 43 33 16 2 42 50 15 13 26 9 59 24 37 72 10 60 63 53 12 25 4 57 11 69 54 36 8 61 58 21 6 30 38 65 14 71 28 44 52 73 66 27 23 46 56 39 22 62 20 68 18 45 76 19 7 29 35 48 49 55 32 78 51 70 67
